Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation
public class CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation extends Object
CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation

The trade allocation that was canceled.

    Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place.

    Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.
    Optional<String>

    The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseGrossAmount>
    grossAmount()
    Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision.

    hashCode()

    identifier()
    Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).
    Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseIdentifierType>

    Unicode CLDR region code.

    lotMatchingInstructions()
    One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.
    Optional<String>
    memo()
    Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The resource name of the trade allocation.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrevailingMarketPrice>
    prevailingMarketPrice()
    The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrice>
    price()
    Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePriceAdjustment>
    priceAdjustment()
    Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseQuantity>
    quantity()
    Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSettlementDate>
    settlementDate()
    Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided.

    sideModifier()
    Side modifier for the trade allocation.

    The source of the submission.

    The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseAssetType> assetType, Optional<? extends List<BondYield>> bondYield, Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity, Optional<String> clientOrderId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<?     • CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation()

  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount()
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument.

    • additionalInstructions

      public Optional<String> additionalInstructions()
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • assetType

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseAssetType> assetType()
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • bondYield

      public Optional<List<BondYield>> bondYield()
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • brokerCapacity

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity()
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • clientOrderId

      public Optional<String> clientOrderId()
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. This is useful for associating the trade allocation with the original trade. This will be assigned a unique UUID if not provided.

    • commissionAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseCommissionAmount> commissionAmount()
      Commission amount of the trade allocation that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    • executionTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime()
      Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • fees

      public Optional<List<BookingFee>> fees()
      Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • fromAccountId

      public Optional<String> fromAccountId()
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.

    • fromActivityId

      public Optional<String> fromActivityId()
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.

    • grossAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseGrossAmount> grossAmount()
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • identifier

      public Optional<String> identifier()
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifierType

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseIdentifierType> identifierType()
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public Optional<String> issuingRegionCode()
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • lotMatchingInstructions

      public Optional<List<BookingLot>> lotMatchingInstructions()
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.

    • memo

      public Optional<String> memo()
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The resource name of the trade allocation.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice()
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Required for FIXED_INCOME trade allocations when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • price

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrice> price()
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

    • priceAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponsePriceAdjustment> priceAdjustment()
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseQuantity> quantity()
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • settlementDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSettlementDate> settlementDate()
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated using the execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • sideModifier

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSideModifier> sideModifier()
      Side modifier for the trade allocation.

    • sourceApplication

      public Optional<String> sourceApplication()
      The source of the submission.

    • specialInstructions

      public Optional<List<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions()
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade allocation (E.g. BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • state

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseState> state()
      The state that the trade allocation is in.

    • toAccountId

      public Optional<String> toAccountId()
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    • toActivityId

      public Optional<String> toActivityId()
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

    • toSide

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseToSide> toSide()
      Denotes the side of the position going into the to_account_id. A to_side of SELL indicates the position will be allocated with a BUY out of the from_account, and a SELL into the to_account.

    • tradeAllocationId

      public Optional<String> tradeAllocationId()
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade allocation globally.

    • whenIssued

      public Optional<CancelTradeAllocationResponseWhenIssued> whenIssued()
      Denotes that this trade allocation was either when_issued or when_distributed.

    • builder

      public static CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation.Builder builder()

    • withAccruedInterestAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAccruedInterestAmount(CancelTradeAllocationResponseAccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument.

    • withAccruedInterestAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAccruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument.

    • withAdditionalInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAdditionalInstructions(String additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • withAdditionalInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAdditionalInstructions(Optional<String> additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • withAssetType

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAssetType(CancelTradeAllocationResponseAssetType assetType)
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • withAssetType

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withAssetType(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseAssetType> assetType)
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • withBondYield

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withBondYield(List<BondYield> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • withBondYield

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withBondYield(Optional<? extends List<BondYield>> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • withBrokerCapacity

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withBrokerCapacity(CancelTradeAllocationResponseBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • withBrokerCapacity

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withBrokerCapacity(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity)
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • withClientOrderId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withClientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. This is useful for associating the trade allocation with the original trade. This will be assigned a unique UUID if not provided.

    • withClientOrderId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withClientOrderId(Optional<String> clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. This is useful for associating the trade allocation with the original trade. This will be assigned a unique UUID if not provided.

    • withCommissionAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withCommissionAmount(CancelTradeAllocationResponseCommissionAmount commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the trade allocation that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    • withCommissionAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withCommissionAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseCommissionAmount> commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the trade allocation that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    • withExecutionTime

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withExecutionTime(OffsetDateTime executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • withExecutionTime

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withExecutionTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • withFees

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFees(List<BookingFee> fees)
      Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • withFees

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFees(Optional<? extends List<BookingFee>> fees)
      Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • withFromAccountId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFromAccountId(String fromAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.

    • withFromAccountId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFromAccountId(Optional<String> fromAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.

    • withFromActivityId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFromActivityId(String fromActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.

    • withFromActivityId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withFromActivityId(Optional<String> fromActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.

    • withGrossAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withGrossAmount(CancelTradeAllocationResponseGrossAmount grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • withGrossAmount

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withGrossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • withIdentifier

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIdentifier(String identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • withIdentifier

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIdentifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • withIdentifierType

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIdentifierType(CancelTradeAllocationResponseIdentifierType identifierType)
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • withIdentifierType

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIdentifierType(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseIdentifierType> identifierType)
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • withIssuingRegionCode

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIssuingRegionCode(String issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • withIssuingRegionCode

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withIssuingRegionCode(Optional<String> issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • withLotMatchingInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withLotMatchingInstructions(List<BookingLot> lotMatchingInstructions)
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.

    • withLotMatchingInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withLotMatchingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<BookingLot>> lotMatchingInstructions)
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.

    • withMemo

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withMemo(String memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • withMemo

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withMemo(Optional<String> memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • withName

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withName(String name)
      The resource name of the trade allocation.

    • withName

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withName(Optional<String> name)
      The resource name of the trade allocation.

    • withPrevailingMarketPrice

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPrevailingMarketPrice(CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrevailingMarketPrice prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Required for FIXED_INCOME trade allocations when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • withPrevailingMarketPrice

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPrevailingMarketPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Required for FIXED_INCOME trade allocations when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • withPrice

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPrice(CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrice price)
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

    • withPrice

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponsePrice> price)
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

    • withPriceAdjustment

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPriceAdjustment(CancelTradeAllocationResponsePriceAdjustment priceAdjustment)
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • withPriceAdjustment

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withPriceAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponsePriceAdjustment> priceAdjustment)
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • withQuantity

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withQuantity(CancelTradeAllocationResponseQuantity quantity)
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • withQuantity

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseQuantity> quantity)
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • withSettlementDate

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSettlementDate(CancelTradeAllocationResponseSettlementDate settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated using the execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • withSettlementDate

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSettlementDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseSettlementDate> settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated using the execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • withSideModifier

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSideModifier(CancelTradeAllocationResponseSideModifier sideModifier)
      Side modifier for the trade allocation.

    • withSideModifier

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSideModifier(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseSideModifier> sideModifier)
      Side modifier for the trade allocation.

    • withSourceApplication

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSourceApplication(String sourceApplication)
      The source of the submission.

    • withSourceApplication

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSourceApplication(Optional<String> sourceApplication)
      The source of the submission.

    • withSpecialInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSpecialInstructions(List<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSpecialInstructions> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade allocation (E.g. BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • withSpecialInstructions

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withSpecialInstructions(Optional<? extends List<CancelTradeAllocationResponseSpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade allocation (E.g. BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • withState

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withState(CancelTradeAllocationResponseState state)
      The state that the trade allocation is in.

    • withState

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withState(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseState> state)
      The state that the trade allocation is in.

    • withToAccountId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToAccountId(String toAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    • withToAccountId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToAccountId(Optional<String> toAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    • withToActivityId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToActivityId(String toActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

    • withToActivityId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToActivityId(Optional<String> toActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

    • withToSide

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToSide(CancelTradeAllocationResponseToSide toSide)
      Denotes the side of the position going into the to_account_id. A to_side of SELL indicates the position will be allocated with a BUY out of the from_account, and a SELL into the to_account.

    • withToSide

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withToSide(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseToSide> toSide)
      Denotes the side of the position going into the to_account_id. A to_side of SELL indicates the position will be allocated with a BUY out of the from_account, and a SELL into the to_account.

    • withTradeAllocationId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withTradeAllocationId(String tradeAllocationId)
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade allocation globally.

    • withTradeAllocationId

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withTradeAllocationId(Optional<String> tradeAllocationId)
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade allocation globally.

    • withWhenIssued

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withWhenIssued(CancelTradeAllocationResponseWhenIssued whenIssued)
      Denotes that this trade allocation was either when_issued or when_distributed.

    • withWhenIssued

      public CancelTradeAllocationResponseTradeAllocation withWhenIssued(Optional<? extends CancelTradeAllocationResponseWhenIssued> whenIssued)
      Denotes that this trade allocation was either when_issued or when_distributed.
